page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Parallel genome assemblies for parallel DNA sequencing
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: De novoassembly of single genomes and metagenomes. also analyses microbe abundance and performs taxonomic profiling as well as making gene ontology profiling. it can also compare genomic content between samples.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: De novoassembly of single genomes and metagenomes. Also analyses microbe abundance and performs taxonomic profiling as well as making gene ontology profiling. It can also compare genomic content between samples.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: De novoassembly of single genomes and metagenomes. Also analyses microbe abundance and performs taxonomic profiling as well as making gene ontology profiling. It can also compare genomic content between samples.
